input: Email the marketing team. Put an at symbol before marketing. Say quote the campaign launches Monday end quote. Actually, make that Tuesday.
ideal: Email the @marketing team. Say "the campaign launches Tuesday".

input: Tell Sarah about the dinner plans. Tag Sarah with an at symbol. Say quote we're meeting at seven end quote. Wait, say six thirty instead.
ideal: Tell @Sarah about the dinner plans. Say "we're meeting at six thirty".

input: Message the design team. Put an at symbol before design. Tell them quote the mockups are approved end quote. Wait, tag the product team instead, not design.
ideal: Message the @product team. Tell them "the mockups are approved".

input: Notify Coach Martinez about practice. Tag Martinez with an at symbol. Say quote practice is at the main field end quote. Wait, make that the north field.
ideal: Notify Coach @Martinez about practice. Say "practice is at the north field".

input: Tell the finance team about the budget. Put an at symbol before finance. Say quote we have five thousand left end quote. Actually, tag accounting instead.
ideal: Tell the @accounting team about the budget. Say "we have five thousand left".

input: Text Dr. Chen about the appointment. Put an at symbol before Chen. Say quote your bloodwork came back normal end quote. Actually, say the results need follow-up.
ideal: Text Dr. @Chen about the appointment. Say "the results need follow-up".

input: Message the venue coordinator. Tag coordinator with an at symbol. Tell her quote we need the room until ten end quote. Wait, make that eleven.
ideal: Message the venue @coordinator. Tell her "we need the room until eleven".

input: Email the contractor about the kitchen. Put an at symbol before contractor. Say quote the cabinets will be ready Thursday end quote. Wait, email the plumber instead, not the contractor.
ideal: Email the @plumber about the kitchen. Say "the cabinets will be ready Thursday".

input: Tell Aunt Rosa about the flight. Tag Rosa with an at symbol. Say quote I land at noon end quote. Actually, say two in the afternoon.
ideal: Tell Aunt @Rosa about the flight. Say "I land at two in the afternoon".

input: Message the band manager. Put an at symbol before manager. Tell him quote the set list is finalized end quote. Scratch that, say we're still deciding.
ideal: Message the band @manager. Tell him "we're still deciding".
